center.name: 阿特拉斯山脈
center.summary: 阿特拉斯山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括African desert warbler，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The warbler breeds in the deserts of north-western Africa south of the Atlas Mountains from southern Morocco east to western Libya and south to Mali and Niger

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The warbler breeds in the deserts of north-western Africa south of the Atlas Mountains from southern Morocco east to western Libya and south to Mali and Niger
